testcase.name: test_create_and_delete_appointment
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter5_comprehensive.py:165: in test_create_and_delete_appointment assert create_response.status_code == 201, f"Create failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"message":["property status should not exist"],"error":"Bad Request","statusCode":400} E assert 400 == 201 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_prescriptions_by_patient
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter5_comprehensive.py:200: in test_get_prescriptions_by_patient assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_latest_score
testcase.failure: tests/test_iter5_comprehensive.py:239: in test_get_latest_score assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
